sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἤμην

- Transliteration: Emen

- Phonetic: ay'-mane

- Definition:

1. truly, assuredly

- Origin: a prolonged form of G2258

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: A prolonged form of G2358; I was. (Sometimes unexpressed.): - be was. [Sometimes unexpressed.]
